group-Runtime.tech-Node: JavaScript runtime; ES2022+ features, built-in fetch, FormData, Blob
group-Runtime.tech-Electron: Desktop shell — BrowserWindow, IPC, desktopCapturer (screen + loopback audio), globalShortcut, content protection, always-on-top overlay
group-Runtime.tech-Lit: Web Components framework for all UI views (MainView, AssistantView, CustomizeView); bundled as lit-core-2.7.4.min.js

group-AI.tech-OpenRouter: LLM API gateway (openrouter.ai/api/v1). Used in two roles: (1) Question detector — fast cheap model (default gpt-4o-mini), low temperature, 256 max tokens; (2) Main answer model — user-selected, streaming SSE, 1024 max tokens, conversation history. Also supports vision models for screenshot analysis (2048 max tokens).
group-AI.tech-Gemini: Google Gemini multimodal API — BYOK mode with user API key, supports audio + vision in single session
group-AI.tech-Groq: Fast inference API (api.groq.com) — used in cloud/BYOK modes for models like qwen3-32b, gpt-oss-120b; per-model character usage limits
group-AI.tech-Ollama: Local LLM inference server — connects to user's Ollama instance (default 127.0.0.1:11434) with configurable model (default llama3.1)
group-AI.tech-WhisperX: Docker-based STT service — supports models large-v3, large-v3-turbo, medium, small; languages ru/en/uk/de/fr/es/zh/ja; uses Silero VAD; requires NVIDIA GPU with CUDA; polled task-based API
group-AI.tech-Whisper-Local: Local Whisper STT on CPU via HuggingFace transformers.js — models Xenova/whisper-tiny, whisper-base, whisper-small; cached in userData directory

group-Infrastructure.tech-Docker: WhisperX container with NVIDIA GPU passthrough (nvidia-docker); exposes HTTP API for transcription with /service/transcribe and /task/{id} endpoints, plus /health check
group-Infrastructure.tech-WebSocket: WebSocket client for managed cloud backend — streams audio and receives AI responses in real time

group-UI.tech-HighlightJS: Syntax highlighting for code blocks in AI responses; bundled as highlight-11.9.0.min.js
group-UI.tech-CSS-Variables: Design token system via CSS custom properties — fonts, colors, spacing, transparency, response font size
group-UI.tech-Markdown: Custom markdown-to-HTML rendering for AI responses — bold, lists, code blocks, links

group-Build.tech-ElectronForge: Build toolchain — start, package, make, publish commands

constraint.reason: Uses Electron 30 desktopCapturer API with loopback audio and setDisplayMediaRequestHandler
Google GenAI SDK v1 multimodal API surface
Lit 2.x Web Components; bundled as single minified file, not installed via npm
Required for built-in fetch, FormData, Blob used in WhisperX upload
